tasks.label: Generate Copilot SDK (C#)
tasks.command: if command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then java -jar openapi-generator-cli.jar generate -g csharp -c ./src/openapi3/config-csharp-copilot.json; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker run --rm -u "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "${workspaceFolder}:/local" openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -g csharp -c /local/src/openapi3/config-csharp-copilot.json; else echo "Neither Java nor Docker was found. Install Java (recommended) or Docker Desktop."; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: Generate Copilot SDK (Python)
tasks.command: if command -v java >/dev/null 2>&1; then java -jar openapi-generator-cli.jar generate -g python -c ./src/openapi3/config-python-copilot.json; elif command -v docker >/dev/null 2>&1; then docker run --rm -u "$(id -u):$(id -g)" -v "${workspaceFolder}:/local" openapitools/openapi-generator-cli generate -g python -c /local/src/openapi3/config-python-copilot.json; else echo "Neither Java nor Docker was found. Install Java (recommended) or Docker Desktop."; exit 1; fi

Install Java (recommended) or Docker Desktop."; exit 1; fi

tasks.label: Clean Slate
args: rm -rf ./src/generated; if [ -d ./src ]; then find ./src -type d \( -name bin -o -name obj \) -prune -exec rm -rf {} +; fi

if (Test-Path './src/generated') { Remove-Item './src/generated' -Recurse -Force }; if (Test-Path './src') { Get-ChildItem -Path './src' -Directory -Recurse -Force | Where-Object { $_.Name -eq 'bin' -or $_.Name -eq 'obj' } | ForEach-Object { Remove-Item $_.FullName -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }
